function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system as directed by AGENTS.MD, and used the authoritative entity record in 10_entities/cast for birthday data.
function.outcome_justification: AGENTS.MD states entity files in 10_entities/cast are authoritative for birthdays when present. The canonical file 10_entities/cast/omar.md identifies Omar Haddad as relationship `ops_lead` and lists birthday `1987-03-18`, which formats to 03/18/1987.
